name: Mutual NDA
description: Standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for protecting confidential information between two parties

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard agreement for cloud service providers and customers

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Defines service availability targets and remedies for cloud services

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Agreement governing the processing of personal data in compliance with GDPR

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement for handling protected health information (PHI)
